artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his profile.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his own sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer whose work has earned him recognition in the electronic music scene. He is known for his collaborations with prominent figures such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the sonic elements that define his productions.
His approach to production is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall rhythms, creating a distinctive sound that has resonated with audiences and fellow artists alike.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his association with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
